conversation.message_text: Helix Sleep: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Helix Sleep.
Helix Sleep: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Helix Sleep: Thanks for reaching out! To confirm you'd like to chat with a Sleep Specialist, please reply SUPPORT.
SUPPORT
Helix Sleep: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@helixsleep.com. Our team is happy to help!
I made a purchase by mistake and need to cancel it
Support
SUPPORT

Helix Sleep: I'm afraid that once an order has been placed, we can't make any changes to it. However, we can still cancel your order so you can reorder a different size or model. To help with this, may I please ask for your order number and email address?

promotions.title: WOW40
content:
• Applies to All items. 

• Only send to new users. 

• Only send to users who abandon the cart and have not purchased before.

promotions.title: YES2BOLD
content: • 30% off purchases for browse abandoners + cart abandoners

promotions.title: MY30
content:
• 30% off welcome offer. 

• Only share with customers who haven't purchased before.

send_to_cs: Send to CS for order status updates
Send to CS if there's a pending ESC and cx ask for an update (even if it's been less than 2 business days)
escalate: ESC immediately if the customer wants an order to arrive at a specific time, or before our standard shipping time
ESC for product info that you can't find on the site
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over
templates: If cx sends us their measurements or asks about making a custom sizing order use the CUS template.
If cx mentions that they're going to lose weight, use 'Lose weight' template.
dos_and_donts: Do not recommend the customer go to a place to get measured
"@ The Vault" items are designated for returns/exchanges, but may also be available in other sizes on The Vault website. Always check there first
When the color is closer to white and not cream we say off white
You should never direct the customer to the sizing chart when they mention custom sizing or they send their measurements
Don't tell the customer to hold off on purchase if they are going to lose weight.
drive_to_purchase: When recommending products, make sure they're aligned with the colors, style the cx is looking for
promo_and_exclusions: If cx ask about pricing, tell them to add items to their cart and the best discount will apply automatically
The 40% discount applies automatically when cx add five or more items to their cart
If cx going to purchase a lot of products in one purchase, share with them what you can find on current offer page along with the link: https://www.sebastiancruzcouture.com/pages/current-offers

Sebastian Cruz Couture: Hey . I'm Jordan. I saw this caught your eye. 😊 https://sebastiancruzcouture.attn.tv/a_g6xzouKkGu 

Any questions I can answer for you?
Yeah
Sebastian Cruz Couture: I would be more than happy to help out, ask away!

I had an ex fiance Lisa Renee haskins who I had a person make a hand stitched short mid length jacket kinda  like this here in the picture but a little more tailored with burgundy red and black inlay stitching that made patterns similar to the men's jacket here I'll send pictures now to see if you all have something similar in design I can look at
Sebastian Cruz Couture: I appreciate your interest in our products, I'll be waiting for the pictures and happy to help once I receive them.
The first picture with the lady in the jacket is how it seem to fit at the shoulders and the last picture of the girl with her back to you is kinda how it came around the front
Sebastian Cruz Couture: Thank you for sharing this with me, however, I'm afraid I did not receive any pictures. Can you please confirm if you have already sent them here?

And the men's jacket is the color that is similar in design to what I had made for my ex fiance Lisa Renee haskins who passed away on me that I would like to see if there is something close that you might have that I can look at for someone else who has came into my life
Yes they are being sent now

Sebastian Cruz Couture: On behalf of the team, I'm truly sorry for your loss and wish you my deepest condolences. I'm afraid I haven't received the pictures. Please send me another message once the pictures are sent.
I had to resend them I hope you received them this time

It was something similar to the lady's jacket In design with the burgundy red and very close to the design of the men's jacket and came around the front like the picture of the girl with her back to you
If you have something close or similar I would like to take a look at them please thank you for your time

Sebastian Cruz Couture: I'm really sorry about this and surely, this isn't the experience I want you to have. Unfortunately, the pictures didn't come through again! The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@sebastiancruzcouture.com. Our team is happy to help!
Okay I sure will thank you sir once again I'll get right on that here in a moment

Does the cloud bundle mean Hoodie and sweatpants ? I want to make sure I'm getting a small in both but it's saying 1 item in stone color
Comfrt: Yes, that's correct. Could you please share a screenshot of the items in your cart so I can double-check?
It looks like i have 2 items in sweat pants , I'd better try and remove one
I just want to make sure they are still in stock before ordering
Comfrt: Thanks for the screenshot. As I can see, it's actually the color storm. Can you confirm it for me, please?
Yes both colors for jacket and pants are Storm
Comfrt: Are you trying to send a picture? For some reason this last image you sent is not appearing on my end. Can you try sending it again? Thank you
I'll send it again
I've sent 3 pictures. I was about to order but it says some things may be out of stock . I want to make sure the bundle is in stock before ordering

Comfrt: Thank you for the details and the screenshots! The bundle means sweatpants and a hoodie. However, the bundles are out of stock right now. And you can order them separately:
Sweatpants: https://comfrt.attn.tv/a-o5cD7sleqI
Hoodie: https://comfrt.attn.tv/avtBvT_im-X1
If you have any questions, feel free to shoot me a text.
It is still trying to combine as a bundle

Comfrt: Thank you for letting me know. Upon checking, I can see here that both of the items that you're looking for are in stock. I hope this helps and please let me know if you have further questions.
So I can still get the bundle or no ?
So I have to place 2 separate orders in ? Do I still get the 15 or 20 % off ?

Comfrt: If there is an option on your end to get the bundle, I suggest that you get them. Regarding your second question, as long as you put the code on the promo box, you can still avail the code. I hope this answers your questions and please let me know if there is anything else that I can assist you with, I'm here to help!

I ordered but was a little confused bc I put my card info in and for some reason I had to do it again , I hope I'm not charged twice for the bundle , it said I couldn't get the comfrt discount but after completing it said I did get it . I'm sick and I've lost so much weight , I just hope everything fits well , thanks for the help

Comfrt: I'm sorry to hear about the confusion with your order! Upon checking here, it looks like your order went through. Could you please check your email, including your spam or promo folders, as sometimes emails end up there?

I also see that you sent a photo, but it's still not visible. If you could send it again, that would really help. Thank you for your understanding, and I hope everything fits well for you!
The one that did not show up said paste so that may be why you did not get it , I sent you several other pics of jacket and pants in size small .
Comfrt: I did get the other photos you sent. It seems like your order went through successfully. Are you all set now?
Yes thank you
Comfrt: Awesome! You're welcome! Have a great day and if you have any questions, feel free to shoot me a text. Don't forget to check out our accessories here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aHa8Sl_sRhPK

Do you do returns ? I should've ask that first in case the small jacket is too small ? I wasn't sure bc I've been in a small this summer but I'm around a small to medium so I hope it's over sixed enough . I'll definitely check your other accessories out . I love the throw you have . Thanks for all the help .

Comfrt: You're welcome and I understand! Yes, we accept returns. You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aRB-lk3inM7v You can start your return here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/aTC5ZxawPQPG/#/

Also, our customers love how comfy our hoodies are, they usually purchase a size up. We always recommend comparing your measurements with our size guide on each product page to find your perfect fit!
I couldn't find the fabric tape measure and I've not been out of the house since last Monday for a doc appt . I would just want to exchange not just send it back .

Comfrt: Yes, you can! Please note that exchanges must be requested within 30 days of delivery. Unfortunately, anything after the 30-day window period can not be approved. Also, tt seems like you sent us an image. Unfortunately, I can't see it on my end. Mind sending it again? I'd be happy to help!
I ordered my bundle already , thank you
Thanks for all your help

Comfrt: My pleasure and thank you for the support! While you're here, check out our loungewear collection: https://comfrt.attn.tv/apla04uWmA-F

Are you all set now?
Yes thank you
Comfrt: You're welcome! Have a great day and if you have any questions, feel free to shoot me a text.
I will 😊

I didn't know i was supposed to order a sz up , every comment I read said they could've went a sz lower . It's the  jacket I'm worried about , I started to get a medium,  should've went with my gut instinct.  Oh well I pray it fits .

Comfrt: Happy to help you find the right size! Our customers love how comfy our hoodies are, they usually purchase a size up. We always recommend comparing your measurements with our size guide on each product page to find your perfect fit! If you're still unsure, just let me know. 

Please send us an email at info@comfrt.com immediately after purchasing if you want to make changes as our warehouse processes orders immediately. Our team is happy to help! 

We offer exchanges for store credit only. In order to qualify for an even exchange all items must be approved/requested within 30 days of delivery. Unfortunately, anything after the 30 day window period can not be approved. All exchanges must be in exact condition with no signs of wear and tear, stains or other signs of usage; including in the original poly bag with SKU to return in. 

I'm sorry, but it looks like the image didn't go through. Could you please send it again? Thank you!

I ordered it yesterday and it went thru on my credit card , I ordered the cloud bundle in stone . It says it will be here in 3 to 4 days . I'll contact you immediately if it doesn't fit and get a bigger size , thank you

Comfrt: Okay, no problem. You will let me know. In the meantime, you can familiarize yourself with the return policy I sent you above.
 Unfortunately, the image is still not coming through. I'm sorry for the inconvenience.

promotions.title: Evergreen Discount
content: • Save up to 50%. See site for additional details.

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS
Send to CS for refund inquiries
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over
Close the convo if the cx first message is ok, no, etc.
Don't use the word "off" when talking about promotions
dos_and_donts: Don't proactively offer to find pricing info, redirect them to the website instead
promo_and_exclusions: Do not offer a coupon to first time purchasers/subscribers. There is not an active discount code at this time. Use DCI shortcut
